title: Customizable Blockoutlines
description: This adds an option to customize your block outlines in-game using a config.
body:
### Dependencies **[Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config/version/0.7.6)** * Sub dependency the mod requires **[KotlinForForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge/version/5.11.0)**
### Support me :3
# Content This mod does one simple thing and one simple thing only, it adds a way for the player to customize their block outline using the in-game config. Here is a photo of the config menu where you can change the color via a colorwheel and the width of the block outlines. Also if you are really feeling up to it you can make the outline rainbow and change the speed (honestly wouldn't go above 2 as it get really fast) ![visual representation of the config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a516e5d41faa4188a5669d4946be974b4206cca0_0.webp)
